task_completion.description: Create a gridset named 'WebMercator512' using EPSG:3857
task_completion.visual_evidence: A gridset named 'WebMercator512' is visible in the Gridsets list or configuration page, with its Coordinate Reference System (CRS) set to 'EPSG:3857'.

task_completion.description: Set the gridset tile dimensions to 512x512 pixels
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'WebMercator512' gridset configuration page, the 'Tile width' and 'Tile height' fields are both set to 512.

task_completion.description: Add at least 5 zoom levels to the gridset
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'WebMercator512' gridset configuration page, the zoom levels table at the bottom contains at least 5 rows (e.g., levels 0 through 4 or more).

task_completion.description: Assign the 'WebMercator512' gridset to the 'ne:ne_countries' tile layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Tile Caching tab for the 'ne:ne_countries' layer, 'WebMercator512' is added to the list of Available gridsets.

task_completion.description: Ensure 'image/png' is an allowed tile image format for the layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Tile Caching tab for the 'ne:ne_countries' layer, the checkbox for 'image/png' is selected under Tile Image Formats.

integrity.description: The agent used the GeoServer web admin GUI in a browser
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the GeoServer web interface (http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/) in a web browser.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing curl commands or scripts interacting with the GeoServer REST API to complete the task.
Screenshots show success messages (e.g., green notification bars) or the final configured state in the list views, rather than just unsaved form inputs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target layer is 'ne:ne_countries'. The new gridset must be named 'WebMercator512' with CRS 'EPSG:3857', tile width 512, tile height 512, and at least 5 zoom levels. The allowed tile image format for the layer must include 'image/png'.
